calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Of Forfeiture
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner People of the State of California's unopposed Motion For Default Judgment of Forfeiture is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court will enter default judgment against Respondent Property U.S. Currency at issue in this action and declare the Respondent Property forfeited pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11470 et seq. and order respondent Property distributed pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11489. The court will enter the proposed order/judgment submitted with the moving papers.

Petitioner is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
